ItacPersonItem.Notes: Professor of both civil and canon law at La Sapeinza, and founder of Accademia degli Intrecciati. See M. Ceresa, `Mandosio, Prospero`, in DBI. C. Carella, `Le biblioteche nelle Accademie...`, in Bbiliothecae selectae..., a cura di E. Canone (1993)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
